pnl.title: P&L Report
pnl.note: Same columns for Equity, F&O and Commodity.

columns.label: Security
columns.meaning: The stock or instrument this row is for.

columns.label: Open (Qty / Price / Amount)
columns.meaning: Your opening position carried into the period — its quantity, price and value.

columns.label: Buy (Qty / Price)
columns.meaning: What you bought during the period — quantity and average buy price.

columns.label: Sell (Qty / Price)
columns.meaning: What you sold during the period — quantity and average sell price.

columns.label: Net Qty (Qty / Price / Amount)
columns.meaning: Your net position after buys and sells — its quantity, price and value.

columns.label: CL. Price
columns.meaning: Closing price — the security's closing market price for the period.

columns.label: Realized P&L
columns.meaning: Profit or loss on positions you closed (sold) during the period.

columns.label: Unrealized P&L
columns.meaning: Profit or loss on positions you still hold, marked to the closing price.

tax.title: Tax Report (Capital Gains)
tax.note: Has two tables: A. Transactions (per transaction) and B. Summary by Security (aggregated).

columns.label: Security Name
columns.meaning: The name of the security transacted.

columns.label: Txn Type
columns.meaning: Transaction type — delivery, intraday, or F&O.

columns.label: ISIN
columns.meaning: The security's ISIN, its unique international identifier.

columns.label: Scrip Symbol
columns.meaning: The security's trading symbol.

columns.label: Fair Market Value
columns.meaning: FMV — the grandfathered value (e.g. the 31 Jan 2018 price) used as the cost for long-term capital gains.

columns.label: Net Qty
columns.meaning: Net quantity transacted.

columns.label: Buy Date
columns.meaning: The purchase (acquisition) date.

columns.label: Buy Value
columns.meaning: The purchase cost.

columns.label: Sell Date
columns.meaning: The sale (disposal) date.

columns.label: Sell Value
columns.meaning: The sale proceeds.

columns.label: Short Term
columns.meaning: Short-term capital gain or loss on the transaction.

columns.label: Long Term
columns.meaning: Long-term capital gain or loss on the transaction.

columns.label: Speculation
columns.meaning: Speculative income — intraday, non-delivery equity gains or losses.

columns.label: Derv Comm
columns.meaning: Derivative and commodity income.

columns.label: Security Name
columns.meaning: The name of the security.

columns.label: Txn Type
columns.meaning: Transaction type — delivery, intraday, or F&O.

columns.label: ISIN
columns.meaning: The security's ISIN identifier.

columns.label: # Transactions
columns.meaning: Number of transactions for this security.

columns.label: Total Buy Value
columns.meaning: Total purchase cost across the security's transactions.

columns.label: Total Sell Value
columns.meaning: Total sale proceeds across the security's transactions.

columns.label: Total Short Term
columns.meaning: Total short-term capital gain or loss for the security.

columns.label: Total Long Term
columns.meaning: Total long-term capital gain or loss for the security.

columns.label: Total Speculation
columns.meaning: Total speculative (intraday) gain or loss for the security.

columns.label: Total Derv Comm
columns.meaning: Total derivative and commodity income for the security.

columns.label: Net P&L
columns.meaning: Net profit or loss for the security across all its transactions.

ledger.title: Ledger
ledger.note: Same columns for the Normal Ledger and the MTF Ledger.

columns.label: Date
columns.meaning: The date of the ledger entry.

columns.label: V.No
columns.meaning: Voucher name — the reference of the accounting entry.

columns.label: Particulars
columns.meaning: Description of the entry (what it was for).

columns.label: Debit
columns.meaning: Amount debited from your ledger.

columns.label: Credit
columns.meaning: Amount credited to your ledger.

columns.label: Balance
columns.meaning: Your running ledger balance after the entry.

contract-note.title: Contract Note cum Tax Invoice
contract-note.note: Per security, split into Buy and Sell sides.

columns.label: ISIN
columns.meaning: The security's ISIN identifier.

columns.label: Security Name/Symbol
columns.meaning: The security's name and trading symbol.

columns.label: Buy Qty
columns.meaning: Quantity bought.

columns.label: Buy WAP
columns.meaning: Weighted average price of your buys.

columns.label: Buy Brokerage/Share
columns.meaning: Brokerage charged per share on the buys.

columns.label: Buy WAP after Brokerage
columns.meaning: Weighted average buy price including brokerage.

columns.label: Total BUY Value after Brokerage
columns.meaning: Total value of the buys including brokerage.

columns.label: Sell Qty
columns.meaning: Quantity sold.

columns.label: Sell WAP
columns.meaning: Weighted average price of your sells.

columns.label: Sell Brokerage/Share
columns.meaning: Brokerage charged per share on the sells.

columns.label: Sell WAP after Brokerage
columns.meaning: Weighted average sell price including brokerage.

columns.label: Total SELL Value after Brokerage
columns.meaning: Total value of the sells including brokerage.

columns.label: Net Qty
columns.meaning: Net quantity after buys and sells.

columns.label: Net Obligation (Rs)
columns.meaning: The net amount payable to or receivable from you after buys, sells and charges.

columns.label: Instrument
columns.meaning: The holding's instrument (stock or security).

columns.label: Exchange
columns.meaning: The exchange it is held on (e.g. NSE, BSE).

columns.label: QTY
columns.meaning: Quantity held.

columns.label: LOT
columns.meaning: Lot size.

columns.label: Avg. Price
columns.meaning: Your average buy price for the holding.

columns.label: LTP
columns.meaning: Last traded price — the current market price.

columns.label: Invested Amt.
columns.meaning: Total amount you invested in the holding.

columns.label: Current Value
columns.meaning: Current market value of the holding.

columns.label: Returns
columns.meaning: Absolute profit or loss on the holding.

columns.label: Returns %
columns.meaning: Profit or loss as a percentage of the invested amount.

columns.label: Product
columns.meaning: Product type — CNC (delivery), MIS (intraday), or MTF.
